chosen: 2026 speed-to-lead benchmark (253,817 leads): 42-hour median response and the 21% vs 2.3% conversion swing, reframed as a median-based self-audit tied to the free Response Audit tool
rejected: Instagram carousel-vs-reels 2026 algorithm research recap — low direct relevance to a service-business owner's revenue
Velocify 6-call-plus-5-email persistence cadence stat — source dated 2012-13, less current than the 2026 benchmark
Blazeo 2026 SLA-compliance stat (54.9% vs 29.5%) — less intuitive and actionable for a solo owner than the median-audit angle

chosen: Feature the Lead Response Audit (blackarrow.ltd/tools) as the free lead magnet, tying its score/leads-lost/revenue-at-risk output directly to the core 17%-response-rate industry benchmark
rejected: Re-feature the Missed Revenue Calculator (already shipped)
Re-feature Black Arrow OS (already shipped twice)
Feature the AI Follow-Up Builder without a citable output metric
Feature the Ad ROI Calculator (less tied to core speed-to-lead brand fact)

chosen: Tool sprawl pain (separate booking/texting/review/spreadsheet tools) resolved by the all-in-one Black Arrow platform, promoting the 14-day free trial and referral deal
rejected: Referral deal spotlighted on its own without a pain hook (score 74, weaker without the sprawl problem framing)
Missed-call text-back as a standalone platform feature promo (score 70, overlaps with prior missed-call demo content)
Revenue reporting feature spotlight alone (score 68, less universally felt pain than tool sprawl)
Quiz funnel feature spotlight alone (score 65, narrower relevance across all verticals)
